card_description: Kozyrev is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick explores "Immanence" using Parmenides' "All" and Kozyrev's time theory, concluding that God is total in every "micropoint."
